heading_path: 机械波 / 弦振动的简正模式
masked_text:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02060:916b710658f7]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02061:f6fb387f8c1f]]


[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02062:11000d9b378f]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02063:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
二胡弦两端都被固定，弦长中必须容纳整数个半波长，即 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02064:fae1e34740a4]]。由边界条件和弦上波速公式可得
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02065:aca2e90e83a2]] 

弦上的波速为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02066:cec39e01aa76]]。于是基频对应 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02067:2ec462ed7091]]：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02068:b227c7644a38]] 
更高次谐频为
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02069:fdac970f1715]] 
基频约为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02070:b2b88cbbf3da]]，各次谐频满足 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02071:a238a679fafc]]。谐频是基频的整数倍，是因为弦长里必须塞下整数个半波长。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02072:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02052:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
入射波在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02053:a6eaf1b0ba56]] 处引起的振动为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02054:d381fc167b80]]，固定端反射要求反射波在端点处为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02055:aec1ab0aa7b0]]。
反射波沿 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02056:5b3d499a40f8]] 方向传播，因此可写成
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02057:cd513ebc18c2]] 
两列波叠加后
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02058:a4255e53f7f1]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02059:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
